overview: This amphibian appears to be a Green Toad (Anaxyrus debilis), a species known for its vibrant green coloration and warty skin. It is identified by its flattened body, prominent eyes, and numerous dark green or black warts. These toads are primarily nocturnal, often spending the day hidden under rocks or in burrows to stay moist. They are typically found in arid and semi-arid regions, such as the southwestern United States and parts of Mexico. coparc +5 6 sites Green Toad

These toads are primarily nocturnal, often spending the day hidden under rocks or in burrows to stay moist.
They are typically found in arid and semi-arid regions, such as the southwestern United States and parts of Mexico.
